top_signals.title: EU Says China Trained Russian Troops to Fight in Ukraine War
top_signals.summary: The European Union’s top diplomat said China has been training Russian troops to fight in Ukraine, sharpening Brussels’ criticism of Beijing’s enabling role in the conflict as the bloc weighs a tougher economic and security stance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bank of Japan takes rates to 1%, the highest level since 1995
top_signals.summary: Inflation and the weak yen forced its hand and made it difficult to wait and see any longer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Surge Copper prefeasibility more than doubles Berg project value
top_signals.summary: The PFS gave the project an after-tax net present value (at 8% discount) of C$4.6 billion, with an internal rate of return of 24%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Rinehart’s $1B SpaceX bet targets mining beyond Earth
top_signals.summary: Australia’s richest person Gina Rinehart sees potential ties between its critical minerals portfolio and Elon Musk’s space venture as demand grows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Veteran Vozinha the Cape Verde hero as keeper shuts out Spain
top_signals.summary: Vozinha broke down in tears at the end of Monday's 0-0 draw with Spain after the 40-year-old was mobbed by his teammates following a stunning display.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
